description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cup with a tall, straight-sided profile and a flat base. The main body appears to be made of a light gray, possibly ceramic or matte-finished metal material, giving it a clean and minimalist look. One side of the cup features a large, flat, dark gray or black panel, which could serve as a visual accent or functional grip area. The cup's interior is visible from the top, showing a hollow cavity suitable for holding liquids. There are no visible handles, lids, or decorative patterns, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as cafes, offices, or public spaces.
description: A tall, rectangular, light gray cup with a flat base and a prominent dark side panel, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain, light gray surface of the cup with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing the dark gray or black side panel and the light gray body, highlighting the contrast between the two surfaces.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the open cavity of the cup and the thickness of the walls, as well as the dark side panel extending downward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full extent of the dark panel and the light gray body, with subtle rectangular markings on the panel.
